default.text: ⟦⟦ S̃ẽc̃õñd̃ãr̃ỹ ãt̃t̃ẽñt̃ĩõñ ĩs̃ ñẽẽd̃ẽd̃ õñ ãd̃j̃ũs̃t̃m̃ẽñt̃s̃. ⟧⟧

transition_focus.text: ⟦⟦ T̃r̃ãñs̃ĩt̃ĩõñs̃ b̃ẽt̃w̃ẽẽñ s̃ẽc̃t̃ĩõñs̃ m̃ãỹ r̃ẽq̃ũĩr̃ẽ ãt̃t̃ẽñt̃ĩõñ. ⟧⟧

recovery_focus.text: ⟦⟦ S̃h̃õr̃t̃ r̃ẽc̃õṽẽr̃ỹ w̃ĩñd̃õw̃s̃ c̃ãñ ĩñf̃l̃ũẽñc̃ẽ f̃l̃õw̃. ⟧⟧
